title: HistoryEvent
description: Contains details about the events of an execution.

fields.name: activityFailedEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about an activity that failed during an execution.

fields.name: activityScheduledEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about an activity scheduled during an execution.

fields.name: activityStartedEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about the start of an activity during an execution.

fields.name: activitySucceededEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about an activity that successfully terminated during an execution.

fields.name: activityTimedOutEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about an activity timeout that occurred during an execution.

fields.name: executionFailedEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about an execution failure event.

fields.name: executionStartedEventDetails
fields.description: Contains details about the start of the execution.
